Home.title: Habesha Dama
Home.subtitle: Play against friends in real-time – with the original rules. Free, simple, and directly in your browser.

why.title: Why Habesha Dama?
why.rulesDesc: We play by the real Habesha rules – including multiple captures and king moves.
why.inviteDesc: Create rooms and share links – your friends can join instantly.
why.nodownloadDesc: Just open the link and start playing – works in any browser.
why.freeDesc: No hidden costs – just sign up and play.
